Localization.Description: A user changed group membership or role in TeamCity. Attackers can perform such actions to maintain access

EventDescriptions.EventDescription: User {subject.account.name} with ID {subject.account.id} added user "{object.new_value}" to critical group {object.name} on host {event_src.host}
User {subject.account.name} with ID {subject.account.id} assigned role "{object.new_value}" to critical group {object.name} on host {event_src.host}
User {subject.account.name} with ID {subject.account.id} added user "{object.new_value}" to group {object.name} on host {event_src.host}
User {subject.account.name} with ID {subject.account.id} assigned role "{object.new_value}" to group {object.name} on host {event_src.host}
User {subject.account.name} with ID {subject.account.id} added group {object.name} to critical group "{object.new_value}" on host {event_src.host}
User {subject.account.name} with ID {subject.account.id} added group {object.name} to group "{object.new_value}" on host {event_src.host}
